children.heading: National energy research and development advisory boards
children.label: a National energy research and development advisory boards

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: The Secretary shall establish one or more advisory boards to review research, development, demonstration, and commercial application programs of the Department in energy efficiency, renewable energy, nuclear energy, and fossil energy.

children.label: A
children.text: designate an existing advisory board within the Department to fulfill the responsibilities of an advisory board under this section; and

children.label: B
children.text: enter into appropriate arrangements with the National Academy of Sciences to establish such an advisory board.

children.heading: Use of existing committees
children.label: b Use of existing committees
children.text: The Secretary shall continue to use the scientific program advisory committees chartered under chapter 10 of title 5 by the Office of Science to oversee research and development programs under that Office.

children.heading: Membership
children.label: c Membership
children.text: Each advisory board under this section shall consist of persons with appropriate expertise representing a diverse range of interests.

children.heading: Meetings
children.label: 1 Meetings
children.text: Each advisory board under this section shall meet at least semiannually to review and advise on the progress made by the respective one or more research, development, demonstration, and commercial application programs.

children.heading: Goals
children.label: 2 Goals
children.text: The advisory board shall review the measurable cost and performance-based goals for the programs as established under , and the progress on meeting the goals.section 16181 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the research, development, demonstration, and commercial application programs authorized by this Act and amendments made by this Act;

children.label: B
children.text: the measurable cost and performance-based goals for the programs as established under , if any; andsection 16181 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: the progress on meeting the goals.

children.heading: Timing
children.label: 2 Timing
children.text: The reviews and assessments shall be conducted every 5 years or more often as the Secretary considers necessary.

children.heading: Reports
children.label: 3 Reports
children.text: The Secretary shall submit to Congress reports describing the results of all the reviews and assessments.
